mapper.select: SELECT * FROM faqs ORDER BY display_order ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM faqs
category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR question LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR answer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO faqs (question, answer, category, display_order) VALUES (#{question}, #{answer}, #{category}, #{displayOrder})
